hero.question: Will Finland win Eurovision 2026?
hero.prob_take: Finland's odds just jumped 3.4 points on $1.3M volume, signaling smart money believes their entry into the contest or recent artist announcement moves the needle harder than the market priced it. At 39.7%, you're paying for a top-3 favorite when Eurovision winners rarely repeat the same public momentum year-over-year, and Finland's historical win rate doesn't justify near-40% odds unless their 2026 artist is genuinely exceptional.

daily_take.headline: Finland's Eurovision Surge Signals Dark Horse Betting Angle Worth Exploiting
daily_take.deck: Finland jumped 3.4 points overnight to 39.7%, riding momentum from recent international pop crossovers and a strengthening Nordic betting bloc. But 40% odds still undervalue their combination of proven Eurovision staging, genre flexibility, and the fact that Scandinavia crushes this competition when it counts. Smart money moves in before the casual money figures it out.
